summary: Frontend testing completed for new Admin Ture tab, mail parse relocation, driver page simplification, auto-time recording, and PDF improvements. All requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin 'Ture' tab: Shows as first tab in admin panel (visible after login)
Admin 'Ture' tab: Genbrugsplads selection buttons visible with tour counts (Glostrup:20, others:0)
Admin 'Ture' tab: Selecting a plads shows mail parse textarea and tour list for that plads
Admin 'Ture' tab: Each plads button shows correct tour count badge
Admin 'Ture' tab: 'Indsæt ture fra mail - {pladsname}' section visible after selection
Admin 'Ture' tab: 'Tilføj ture' button and 'Slet alle i {plads}' button present
Driver page: No mail parse section visible - correctly removed
Driver page: 'Tilføj tur manuelt' section present for manual tour entry
Driver page: Pause buttons (15/30/45 min) and 'Slet alt' button present
Tour completion: Clicking complete button auto-records current time (tested: time was '18:33' after completion)
Weight entry: Entering weight and pressing Enter auto-records time if no time was set (tested: initial '' became '18:33')
PDF generation: Works without errors and shows 'PDF genereret!' success toast
PDF content: Includes completed tours list sorted by time (code verified lines 1772-1828)
All 5 admin tabs navigable: Ture, Planlægning, Chauffører, Genbrugsplads, Historik
No JavaScript console errors during any operation
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Ture tab correctly moved to first position with mail parse functionality
handleToggleComplete at line 1645-1655 correctly sets time when completing: time: nowCompleting ? (tour.time || currentTime) : tour.time
TourRow handleWeightSubmit at line 84-89 correctly sets time on weight entry: time: tour.time || currentTime
PDF generation at lines 1772-1828 correctly sorts completed tours by time and excludes non-completed tours
Driver page only has manual tour entry, pause buttons, and clear - mail parse removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Admin Ture tab is first tab with genbrugsplads selection and mail parse. 2) Driver page has no mail section, only manual tour entry. 3) Time auto-records on tour completion and weight entry. 4) PDF includes completed tours sorted by time with weight. All 5 admin tabs (Ture, Planlægning, Chauffører, Genbrugsplads, Historik) are navigable without console errors.
